𝗧𝗘𝗫𝗧𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗠 | To provide a discreet and customizable teleprompter experience for macOS users during live streams, interviews, or presentations.  🔥 Super Hot!

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🍎 Swift 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a discreet and customizable teleprompter experience for macOS users during live streams, interviews, or presentations.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time word tracking using on-device speech recognition
✅ Classic auto-scroll with adjustable speed
✅ Voice-activated scrolling that pauses when silent
✅ Dynamic Island-style overlay, draggable floating window, or fullscreen on Sidecar iPad
✅ Customizable font, size, and highlight color
✅ Support for multiple languages in speech recognition
✅ Mouse scroll to catch up functionality


❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 175 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 12 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Textream is a free, open-source macOS teleprompter application designed for streamers, interviewers, and presenters. It offers real-time word tracking, classic auto-scroll, and voice-activated scrolling, displayed in a discreet overlay that is invisible to the audience.

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/f/textream

𝗠𝗔𝗫𝗨𝗡 | Enabling users to extract structured data from websites and turn them into APIs through a no-code interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling users to extract structured data from websites and turn them into APIs through a no-code interface.
📅 Created: Oct 2023 • Updated: Apr 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✅ No-code web data platform
✅ Real-time web scraping and crawling
✅ AI-powered data extraction
✅ Recorder Mode for robot creation
✅ SDK for developers
✅ CLI for terminal interaction
✅ Self-hosted option


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

Maxun is an open-source, no-code platform designed to transform websites into structured data APIs. It offers tools for web scraping, crawling, search, and AI-powered data extraction, enabling users to automate data collection without writing code.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗟𝗘𝗚𝗥𝗔𝗠-𝗠𝗖𝗣 | To act as a bridge between AI models/clients and the Telegram messaging platform, enabling AI to read, understand, and interact with Telegram chats and groups programmatically.  ✨ Notable!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To act as a bridge between AI models/clients and the Telegram messaging platform, enabling AI to read, understand, and interact with Telegram chats and groups programmatically.
📅 Created: Mar 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Full-featured Telegram integration for MCP-compatible clients (Claude, Cursor, etc.)
✅ Powered by Telethon and the Model Context Protocol (MCP)
✅ Programmatic interaction with Telegram accounts
✅ Extensive tools for chat and group management (creation, editing, participant management, banning, etc.)
✅ Comprehensive messaging functionalities (sending, editing, deleting, forwarding, pinning messages)
✅ Media management capabilities
✅ Contact management
✅ Settings management


✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

Telegram MCP Server is a Python-based server that leverages the Telethon library to provide a comprehensive interface for interacting with Telegram. It allows MCP-compatible clients, such as AI assistants, to read chats, manage groups, send and modify messages, media, contacts, and settings.

𝗖𝗟𝗜𝗣𝗕𝗢𝗔𝗥𝗗-𝗛𝗜𝗦𝗧𝗢𝗥𝗬 | Managing and searching clipboard history on Linux systems.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Managing and searching clipboard history on Linux systems.
📅 Created: Jan 2024 • Updated: Apr 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Remembers clipboard history across reboots
✅ Saves images and arbitrary bytes
✅ Searchable history with Regex or raw queries
✅ Installable on any Linux system
✅ Efficient storage using custom binary format
✅ Fast and scalable with support for ~1 million entries
✅ Composable client-server architecture
✅ Supports Wayland and X11


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 448 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 17 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 16 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Ringboard is a Rust-based clipboard manager for Linux that efficiently stores, searches, and retrieves clipboard history, including images and arbitrary data. It features a client-server architecture for composability and supports a large history size with minimal resource usage.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/SUPERCILEX/clipboard-history

𝗡𝗢𝗖𝗧𝗔𝗟𝗜𝗔-𝗦𝗛𝗘𝗟𝗟 | To provide a beautiful, minimal, and highly customizable desktop shell experience for Wayland users.  🔥 Super Hot!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 QML 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a beautiful, minimal, and highly customizable desktop shell experience for Wayland users.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Native support for Niri, Hyprland, Sway, Scroll, Labwc and MangoWC
✅ Extensive theming with predefined color schemes and automatic color generation from your wallpaper
✅ Wallpaper management with Wallhaven integration
✅ Notification system with history and Do Not Disturb
✅ Multi-monitor support
✅ Lock screen
✅ Desktop widgets (clock, media player and more)
✅ OSD for volume and brightness
✅ Nearly 100 plugins available
✅ Setup wizard for first-time users
✅ Built on Quickshell for performance


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 422 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 188 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Noctalia Shell is a minimal and customizable desktop shell for Wayland, built on Quickshell (Qt/QML). It offers extensive theming, wallpaper management, a notification system, multi-monitor support, and a lock screen, with nearly 100 available plugins.

gdrive is a command-line interface (CLI) application built with Rust for interacting with Google Drive. It allows users to manage their files and folders directly from the terminal, acting as a successor to previous gdrive versions.
